summary: Dashboard.tsx was updated to compute the "Dus (RDV Faits ; Mois Courant)" value using shared monthly listing utilities (calculateTotalCreditNegatif) and to fetch the additional inputs (all appointments and previous-month listing data). The diff summary also indicates unrelated UI/label/formatting changes in FinancialOverview and additional dashboard computations/routes not requested by the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Changed FinancialOverview card labels and numeric formatting (e.g., “updated French labels” and “numeric values only (no currency symbols)”).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly lists as a non-goal: do not change UI labels/language/formatting unless required to fix the calculation mismatch. The diff summary indicates label/formatting changes beyond the calculation fix.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/changed annual statistics computation on Dashboard (sum of 12 monthly “Revenus (Faits et Payés)” values) and added fetching monthly listings for all 12 months of the current year.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-1/REQ-2 (which focus specifically on making the “Dus” card match the Monthly Listing negative credit logic and ensuring required inputs for that calculation).

hallucinated_features.description: Added a new “/client-database” route and “Base Client” navigation tab (and multiple other app-wide features summarized).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not part of the BuildRequest scope, which is limited to fixing the Dashboard “Dus” calculation consistency with the Monthly Listing table.
